name: Jim Morrison
description: American singer and poet; lead vocalist of The Doors (1943–1971)
abstract: James Douglas Morrison (December 8, 1943 – July 3, 1971) was an American singer-songwriter and poet who was the lead vocalist and primary lyricist of the rock band the Doors. Due to his charismatic persona, poetic lyrics, distinctive voice, and unpredictable performances, along with the dramatic circumstances surrounding his life and ear…

about_quotes.speaker: Warren Bernhardt
about_quotes.evidence: it’s hard to have — to know Jimi Hendrix and say I’m better than you are, it’s really hard. Jim Morrison or Tim or any of those guys in that world
about_quotes.doc_title: Warren Bernhardt interviewed by Monk Rowe, Bearsville, New York, January 3, 2012
